description: 鼓励他人的常用动词短语句子。
examples_json: [{"en":"Don't give up! You can do it.","zh":"不要放弃！你能做到的。"}]
[{"en":"I'm looking for my phone. Have you seen it?","zh":"我在找我的手机，你看见了吗？"}]
[{"en":"I've run out of milk. I need to buy some.","zh":"牛奶喝完了，我需要买一些。"}]
[{"en":"I came up with a solution to the problem.","zh":"我想出了一个解决问题的办法。"}]

description: 表示无法忍受某事/某人。
examples_json: [{"en":"I can't put up with this noise anymore.","zh":"我再也受不了这噪音了。"}]
[{"en":"My colleagues and I get along well.","zh":"我和同事们相处得很好。"}]

description: 描述习惯性动作。always/usually/often + 一般现在时。
examples_json: [{"en":"I usually wake up at 7 AM.","zh":"我通常早上7点起床。"}]

meaning: 我目前正在...(现在进行时)
description: 描述当前正在进行的动作。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm currently working on a new project.","zh":"我目前正在做一个新项目。"}]

description: 描述已经完成的事情。already / just / ever / never。
examples_json: [{"en":"I have already finished the report.","zh":"我已经完成了报告。"}]

description: 描述过去某时发生的事。
examples_json: [{"en":"Yesterday I visited the museum.","zh":"昨天我参观了博物馆。"}]

description: 描述过去某时正在做的事被另一件事打断。
examples_json: [{"en":"I was having dinner when the phone rang.","zh":"我正吃晚饭时电话响了。"}]

meaning: 我以前从未...过...(过去完成时)
description: 描述过去某时间点之前从未有过的经历。
examples_json: [{"en":"I had never tried sushi before that day.","zh":"在那天之前我从未尝过寿司。"}]
[{"en":"It was difficult but I managed to do it.","zh":"很困难但我设法做到了。"}]
[{"en":"I was late so I missed the bus.","zh":"我迟到了所以没赶上公交。"}]

difficulty: Although + 从句 + 主句表示"虽然...但是..."。
description: [{"en":"Although it was raining, we went for a walk.","zh":"虽然下着雨我们还是去散步了。"}]

text: The book that I read was...
description: 用that从句修饰名词。defining relative clause。
examples_json: [{"en":"The book that I read was really interesting.","zh":"我读的那本书非常有趣。"}]

difficulty: 如果我有更多时间我会...
examples_json: 用if引导的条件句表达假设。
column9: [{"en":"If I had more time, I would learn another language.","zh":"如果我有更多时间我会再学一门语言。"}]

examples_json: [{"en":"I always have breakfast before leaving.","zh":"我总是在出门前吃早餐。"}]
[{"en":"The movie was quite interesting.","zh":"这部电影相当有趣。"}]
[{"en":"Please drive carefully on the icy road.","zh":"在结冰的路上请小心驾驶。"}]

description: 评论副词放在句首修饰全句。
examples_json: [{"en":"Luckily, I had my umbrella with me.","zh":"幸运的是我带了伞。"}]
[{"en":"The meeting is on Monday afternoon.","zh":"会议在周一下午。"}]
[{"en":"I was born in March 1998.","zh":"我出生在1998年3月。"}]
[{"en":"The class starts at 9 o'clock.","zh":"课程在9点开始。"}]
while引导的时间从句表示同时发生。
column9: [{"en":"While I was cooking, I listened to music.","zh":"我做饭时听音乐。"}]

examples_json: after引导时间从句表示先后。
column9: [{"en":"After I finished work, I went home.","zh":"下班后我回家了。"}]

description: before引导时间从句表示之前。
examples_json: [{"en":"I always check my email before I leave the office.","zh"::"我离开办公室前总是检查邮件。""}]"
[{"en":"The cat is on the sofa.","zh":"猫在沙发上。"}]

text: The... is next to / behind / under...
examples_json: [{"en":"The bank is next to the supermarket.","zh":"银行在超市旁边。"}]
[{"en":"Go straight until you see the traffic lights.","zh":"直走直到你看到红绿灯。"}]
[{"en":"Turn left at the corner and you'll see the hotel.","zh":"在角落左转你就会看到酒店。"}]

text: It's on the corner / at the end of the street.
meaning: 它在转角处/在街道尽头。
examples_json: [{"en":"The post office is at the end of the street.","zh":"邮局在街道尽头。"}]
